name: Claude Skill Registry
description: Massive aggregated registry of 100k+ deduplicated Claude Code SKILL.md files from GitHub, with daily automated updates via GitHub Actions. Three-tier consumption: web UI, sk CLI, and JSON API. Requires sk CLI or web UI. Daily-updated index of 100k+ Claude Code skills from GitHub.
review: Meta-tool indexing 107k+ deduplicated skills from GitHub. 9/10 functionality with daily automated updates via GitHub Actions and three-tier consumption system (web UI, CLI, JSON API). High quality, active development. Conditional approval due to install complexity and external dependency on hosted service.

drax_results.notes: Massive aggregated registry of 162k+ Claude Code SKILL.md files with web UI and sk CLI. Core functionality verified, some install complexity.

catalog_note: Requires sk CLI or web UI. Daily-updated index of 100k+ Claude Code skills from GitHub.
